data.title: Costco nominates Gina Raimondo, former Secretary of Commerce and Governor, to its Board of Directors.
data.description: Issaquah-based retailer Costco Wholesale Corporation revealed the nomination of Secretary Gina Raimondo to its Board of Directors. Raimondo, previously the 40th Secretary of Commerce from 2021 to 2025 and Governor of Rhode Island between 2015 and 2021, began her political career as the Treasurer of the State of Rhode Island in 2010. Before venturing into politics, Secretary Raimondo had a background in venture capital and currently serves as a distinguished fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations. With her rich political and professional experience, she is set to join Costco's Board of Directors.

data.title: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is investigating potential violations of federal securities laws for uniQure N.V. Investors.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Radnor, Pennsylvania, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP announced an ongoing probe into potential breaches of federal securities regulations for investors of uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE). The investigation follows uniQure's November 3, 2025, disclosure. For more details, visit ktmc.com.
Chinese drone maker DJI urges Trump administration to complete audit or extend deadline for security review - letter to Congress.

data.title: FreightCar America to attend Sidoti Virtual Conference on Dec. 11, 2025. CEO and CFO will participate in one-on-one investor meetings. Contact RAILIR@riveron.com for more info. Company is a leading manufacturer and supplier of railroad freight cars, railcar parts, and components, based in Chicago since 1901. Visit www.freightcaramerica.com for details.
data.description: FreightCar America, Inc. announced participation in Sidoti's Year End Virtual Investor Conference on December 11, 2025. The CEO and CFO will engage in one-on-one meetings with investors. FreightCar America, based in Chicago, specializes in designing, producing, and supplying railroad freight cars, parts, and components, as well as offering repair, rebody, and conversion services. The company, established in 1901, plays a vital role in the North American supply chain. For more information or to schedule a meeting, contact their Investor Relations team at RAILIR@riveron.com. Visit www.freightcaramerica.com for details.

data.title: Luxury townhome community Rivercrest coming soon to Reno, NV near Truckee River with Riverwalk District.
data.description: Rivercrest is set to introduce upscale townhomes in an exclusive area adjacent to the Truckee River and Riverwalk District. These luxury residences will provide exceptional living spaces for those who value both elegance and convenience.

data.title: SentinelOne's Q3 revenue hit $258.91 million, beating $257.7M consensus. Stock slips as guidance falls short.
data.description: SentinelOne Inc (NYSE: S) recently released their third-quarter financial results, with revenue reaching $258.91 million, surpassing the predicted $257.7 million. The company's adjusted earnings for the quarter were 7 cents per share, outperforming the anticipated 5 cents per share. Their total revenue experienced a 23% year-over-year growth. Additionally, the Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) also saw an increase. SentinelOne stock is currently exhibiting a downward trend. Traders are advised to keep an eye on various factors while dealing with S. This information can be found in detail on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Early cold snap hits Northeast, New Jersey American Water advises customers to protect pipes to prevent repairs.
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, on December 4, 2025, an early onset of frigid temperatures has hit the Northeast region. New Jersey American Water is advising its customers to safeguard their plumbing to prevent expensive damages. It is crucial to take precautionary measures to protect pipes from freezing as temperatures drop rapidly.Residents should act promptly to avert potential issues and the need for costly repairs due to the severe weather conditions.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum show recovery potential on Myriad as traders turn bullish. Focus on top markets with predictions and odds of liquidation.
data.description: This week, leading markets on Myriad are focusing on forecasts for Bitcoin and Ethereum, highlighting the potential directions of these cryptocurrencies. Additionally, discussions include the likelihood of another significant liquidation event in the near future. Investors are closely watching the market trends to anticipate any potential fluctuations in prices.

data.title: ScottsMiracle-Gro to present at Raymond James 2025 TMT & Consumer Conference on Dec 9 at 2:20pm ET in NY.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Marysville, Ohio, The Scotts Miracle-Gro Company (NYSE: SMG), known for being the top marketer of branded consumer lawn and garden products in North America, shared plans for Nate Baxter, president and COO, and Mark Scheiwer, CFO and CAO, to engage in a fireside chat at the Raymond James 2025 TMT & Consumer Conference in New York on December 9, 2025, at 2:20 p.m. ET. This conference marks a significant event for the company in the financial and consumer sectors.

data.title: Chemours names Michael Foley as new President of Titanium Technologies, Damián Gumpel to depart. #businessnews
data.description: Chemours, headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware, has appointed Michael Foley as the new President of Titanium Technologies. This announcement comes alongside news of the departure of Damián Gumpel from the company. Chemours, a leading chemical company, made this decision to continue its strategic growth and development. The company's stock symbol is $CC.

data.title: Owens Corning raises dividend by 15% to $0.79 per share, payable on Jan 21, 2026, to shareholders on record by Jan 5.
data.description: Owens Corning has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.79 per common share, marking a 15% increase from the previous dividend. The dividend is set to be paid on January 21, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 5, 2026. Subsequent dividend decisions will be subject to the Board of Directors' discretion, influenced by factors such as company earnings, financial status, and cash needs.

data.title: Darling Ingredients to sell $60M in production tax credits generated by Diamond Green Diesel joint venture to a corporate buyer by Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Irving-based Darling Ingredients Inc. (NYSE: DAR) revealed a recent deal to sell about $60 million worth of production tax credits to a corporate entity. These tax credits were produced under the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) through the company’s joint venture, Diamond Green Diesel. The anticipated receipt of the proceeds from this agreement is slated for Dec. 31, 2025, subject to specific funding criteria being met. This transaction follows a prior announcement in September where the company sold $125 million in credits.

data.title: Heritage Insurance to present at Sidoti Year End Virtual Conference; CEO and CFO to participate.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on December 4, 2025, Heritage Insurance Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: HRTG) disclosed that Ernie Garateix, the CEO, and Kirk Lusk, the CFO, of the super-regional property and casualty insurance holding company, will be engaging in the Sidoti Year End event.

data.title: Trusted Space gets growth investment from Washington Harbour Partners to enhance solutions for space challenges.
data.description: A prominent partnership has been unveiled in Washington on December 4, 2025, with Washington Harbour Partners LP ("Washington Harbour") leading the way to enhance Trusted Space's position in devising solutions for critical challenges in the space sector. This collaboration aims to address pressing issues within the space domain and solidify Trusted Space's prominent presence.

data.title: Tough market for truck dealers, used farm equipment sales increase slightly. Heavy machinery sales sluggish.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, as of December 4, 2025, recent market reports from Sandhills Global reveal challenging conditions for used truck dealers. The data for November indicates a small increase in used agricultural equipment sales, but a slow movement in used heavy machinery purchases. Some dealers are shifting their focus towards rentals due to the sluggish sales environment.

data.title: IDT Corporation Q1 FY 2026 results show income from NRS, Fintech, and net2phone segments increasing by 35%, 97%, and 94%. Record levels of consolidated gross profit and Adjusted EBITDA.
data.description: Revenue generated from NRS, Fintech, and net2phone segments saw a significant surge of 35%, 97%, and 94%, respectively. The company achieved all-time high levels of consolidated gross profit and recorded a notable increase in Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted EBITDA margin.
